function setAgeCommitment(address user, uint256 commitment) external
function ageCommitment(address user) external view returns (uint256)
function verifyAge(address user, uint8 minAge, uint16 currentYear, uint[2] pA, uint[2][2] pB, uint[2] pC) external view returns (bool)
event AgeCommitmentSet(address indexed user, uint256 commitment)
